    devel/ocaml-opam: GNUMake run dependency.

    GNUMake is needed to build ocaml, and therefore it is needed by the
    `opam init` command.

    PR:             261180
    Reported by:    fuz
    Approved by:    hannes@mehnert.org (maintainer)
    MFH:            2024Q1
